notableEvents.label: Jake Burger GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Burger grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Josh Jung out at 2nd. Jake Burger out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Evan Carter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Evan Carter grounds out to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson pops out to third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson reaches on catcher interference by Brett Sullivan. Joc Pederson to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Brett Sullivan. Joc Pederson scores. Justin Foscue to 3rd. Alejandro Osuna to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
